title: senna skinneri
intro: Senna skinneri, also known as the Mexican buckthorn, is a plant species in the legume family, native to Mexico and the southwestern United States, known for its medicinal and laxative properties. The medicinal properties of Senna skinneri come from its seeds, which contain anthraquinone glycosides, responsible for its purgative effects. The health benefits of Senna skinneri include its use as a natural laxative to treat constipation, as well as its potential to aid in weight loss and reduce inflammation. Senna skinneri is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the dried leaves or seeds in hot water, and can also be found in herbal supplements and capsules.
